subcodes.first_line: This is the Day whereon He Who conversed on Sinai hath mounted the Throne of Revelation before all faces and calleth out with most exalted utterance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا یوم فیه استوی مکلم الطور علی عرش الظهور امام الوجوه و ینادی باعلی البیان
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @love of God, @Manifestation of God as sun
